title: Beyonder - End Tweaks
description: Touches up End content. Made for Enderscape, but works with vanilla too!
body:
This pack is created as a complement to the mod [Enderscape](https://modrinth.com/mod/enderscape), but also works well in a vanilla context!

Current list of changes are:
- Refined Enderman with dynamic eyes
- Refined Endermite
- Refined Shulkers and Shulker Boxes
- Redesigned Dragon Egg, complete with a new item sprite
- Mild tweaks to the Purpur family

More changes are planned for the future, such as Elytra and Chorus Plants!
